name: open-devops-skills
description: Open DevOps Skills for Claude Code and Codex — zombie resource scanning, cost optimization, K8s troubleshooting, and more for SRE teams.

interface.shortDescription: DevOps & SRE skill pack — zombie resource scanning, cost optimization, and K8s troubleshooting.
interface.longDescription: Production-ready DevOps skills for SRE and platform engineering teams. Covers zombie resource detection, cloud cost optimization, Kubernetes troubleshooting, and more. Each skill follows a multi-agent pipeline pattern: Plan → Collect → Validate → Analyze → Report.
